RingCentral.name: RingCentral
RingCentral.description: Cloud-based business communications platform offering messaging, video, phone, and contact center solutions. Recently achieved profitability post-restructuring with GAAP operating income of $121M in 2025.

VectorOne.name: VectorOne
VectorOne.description: Custom software development and AI solutions company.

Stripe.name: Stripe
Stripe.description: Global payments infrastructure company. Valuation surged 74% to $159B in Feb 2026. Processes payments for millions of businesses worldwide.

Amplitude.name: Amplitude
Amplitude.description: Digital analytics platform helping companies understand user behavior across web and mobile products. Key competitor to Mixpanel and Google Analytics.

Yelp.name: Yelp
Yelp.description: Local business review and discovery platform. Investing heavily in AI transformation. Guiding $1.46-1.48B revenue for 2026.

Greenhouse Software.name: Greenhouse Software
Greenhouse Software.description: Leading applicant tracking system (ATS) and hiring platform used by thousands of companies for structured hiring.

Zillow.name: Zillow
Zillow.description: Leading real estate technology marketplace. Recently reduced ~200 roles in Jan 2026 performance review. Focus on integrated housing super app.

Yahoo.name: Yahoo
Yahoo.description: Global digital media and advertising technology company. Acquired by Apollo Global Management in 2021 for ~$5B. Operates Yahoo Mail, Yahoo Finance, Yahoo News, and advertising platforms.

LiveRamp.name: LiveRamp
LiveRamp.description: Data connectivity platform enabling companies to use data for analytics, marketing, and personalization. Leader in identity resolution and data clean rooms.

Amazon Ads.name: Amazon Ads
Amazon Ads.description: Amazon's advertising business, the 3rd largest digital ad platform globally. Offers Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, DSP, and streaming TV ads.

Intuit.name: Intuit
Intuit.description: Global financial technology platform powering TurboTax, QuickBooks, Credit Karma, and Mailchimp. Heavily investing in AI-driven experiences and Intuit Assist.

Yieldmo.name: Yieldmo
Yieldmo.description: Programmatic advertising platform using AI and machine learning for ad format innovation and audience targeting.

Smart Commerce.name: Smart Commerce
Smart Commerce.description: ML/AI-based data platform that centralizes CPG product data and transforms marketing touchpoints into e-commerce launch points. Raised $27M total funding.

Giga.name: Giga
Giga.description: AI platform automating enterprise customer support with real-time agents. Raised $61M Series A led by Redpoint Ventures. YC-backed.

Salesforce.name: Salesforce
Salesforce.description: World's largest CRM platform. Products include Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Tableau, Slack, and MuleSoft. Aggressively investing in Agentforce AI platform.

Sigma.name: Sigma Computing
Sigma.description: Cloud-native business intelligence and analytics platform. Hit $100M ARR in 2025. Total funding $662M. Combines spreadsheet-like interface with direct cloud data warehouse access.
